title: dryopteris punctata var. rugosula
intro: Dryopteris punctata var. rugosula, also known as the rough-leaved autumn fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The rough-leaved autumn fern has been valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
